properties.bioavailability: Oral: 8.6-11.4% (This is due to the extensive first pass hepatic metabolism) - Presumably higher when taken with fatty acids.
properties.summary: An anxiolytic nootropic which modulates the AMPA receptor. Significantly more potent than racetam. May have positive effects on memory and cognition. Little recreational value. Sold in Europe as a prescription drug, but not approved by the FDA in the US.
